sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12539" key="a)podrapeteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποδρᾱπετεύω</orth>, <sense id="n12539.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run away from,</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> in<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.80</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
